## Da Vinci Code Web — Prototype v1.0.0

첫 프로토타입 릴리스. GitHub Pages + Render 배포 완료, 2인 플레이 QA 통과.

### Play

**https://elkeipy.github.io/DaVinciCode_Coda/**

### What's included

- Real-time multiplayer (lobby, rooms, chat)
- Full game rules (FirstPlan v0.6 + rule 10: continue guess or pass after success)
- Mobile-friendly vertical UI
- Server-authoritative game logic (`shared/rules`)

### Stack

- Client: React + Vite → GitHub Pages
- Server: Express + Socket.io → Render (`https://davincicode-coda.onrender.com`)

### Known limitations

- **Render Free tier**: server sleeps after ~15 min idle (first load may take 30–90s)
- **In-memory state**: rooms/games reset on server restart

### Local dev

```bash
cd davinci-code-web
npm install
npm run dev
```
